title: Large Wicker Storage Basket, Grey Wash, Rope Handles, Round Log Basket, Blanket Basket
features: WICKER BASKET FOR LOGS - This large chunky grey log basket is made from full willow. Finished in a lovely antique grey, it works for many different interior styles. The rope handles mean the basket is durable and strong enough to hold a good amount of firewood.

100% NATURAL WICKER MATERIAL - Our wicker baskets are made from a sustainable, renewable source. The water-based varnish used adds a layer of protection to the baskets. It's also chemical-free and non-toxic.

ROUND FIRESIDE LOG BASKETS - Designed to complement cosy nights by the fire, the rustic aesthetic of the basket complements many different decors. Fill your storage basket with logs and kindling from your outside container and place it next to your fireplace. This saves you time going outside and it looks lovely.
STORAGE BASKET - The grey basket isn't just for logs and kindling, it's ideal for storage in any room in the home. Use it to pack away small toys, games, blankets, towels and more.
EASY TO CARRY - The rope handles are flexible and add to the rustic look of the basket. Use the handles to carry your basket from room to room with ease.
SPECIFICATIONS - Height excl. handle 42cm, Top diameter 50cm, Base diameter 40cm.
description: "Create a cosy and welcoming atmosphere with this handmade grey log basket. Place next to your fireplace, log burner or wood burning stove to house wooden logs and kindling in an aesthetically pleasing way. It's a must-have all year round that adds a rustic look to your interiors. Store logs and kindling of all sizes within the wicker basket. Thanks to the colour of the water-based varnish, you get an eye-catching container that can house small blankets, toys, cushions and more. A versatile piece that has been expertly handwoven and finished to the highest standard, like all our baskets. The basket features two flexible rope handles so it’s easy for you to transport logs from the outside store into your home. Sturdy and stylish, it’ll make a fantastic addition to a range of interior styles. Height excl. handle 42cm, Top diameter 50cm, Base diameter 40cm.
